name: Emergent BioSolutions Inc.
summary: PART I OVERVIEW We are a global life sciences company focused on providing innovative preparedness and response solutions addressing accidental, deliberate and naturally occurring Public Health Threats (PHTs). Our solutions include a product portfolio, a product development portfolio, and a contract development and manufacturing (CDMO) services portfolio.
